The Garden Club
at Wild Heaven West End
Live Music and Private Events
About Us
The Garden Club, nestled within the Wild Heaven West End Brewery & Gardens in Atlanta, Georgia, is a 500+ capacity live music venue and events space.
The stage has been graced by the likes of such acts as Big Boi from Outkast, Reggae legend King Yellowman, Gabe Dixon (Paul McCartney, Tedeschi Trucks Band), Mike Doughty (Soul Coughing), Shinyribs, Grammy-nominated bluesman Cedric Burnside, Low Cut Connie, The Bright Light Social Hour, Billy Allen + The Pollies, Ghost Funk Orchestra, Jimbo Mathus (Squirrel Nut Zippers), Cary Hudson (Blue Mountain), Toubab Krewe, Zach Deputy, Larry McCray, The Empty Pockets, Corb Lund, Ruby Velle & The Soulphonics, Jupiter Coyote, Grass is Dead, Kudzu Kings, Chris Duarte Group, Blue Dogs, The Weeks, Yo Mama’s Big Fat Booty Band, and many others.
So, whether it’s Rock, Blues, R&B, Jazz, Reggae or Country music, it has a place to play in Atlanta here.
As part of the Wild Heaven family, The Garden Club offers a lineup of freshly brewed Wild Heaven beers, including favorites like Emergency Drinking Beer and Sunburst IPA.
Whether you’re a music enthusiast or simply seeking a lively, vibrant atmosphere, The Garden Club invites you to come and enjoy great tunes, refreshing drinks, and a warm community vibe.

Frequently Asked Questions
What is your bag policy?
We allow small bags/purses only. No backpacks or larger bags are permitted unless they are required for medical purposes.
What is your dress code?
We do not have a specific dress code, but shirts, pants, and shoes are always required in our venue.
What is your weapons policy?
Absolutely no weapons are allowed in the venue under any circumstances. We ask that you please leave any weapons at home or in your vehicle for the safety of our guests and staff.
Do I need an ID to enter The Garden Club?
Most shows are All Ages. All attendees for any show or event at The Garden Club at Wild Heaven West End that intend on drinking need to be 21 years of age or older. An ID is required for entry into the venue. We take checking IDs very seriously. In compliance with Georgia laws, anyone thought to be under 35 years old must be checked for proof of age. Servers, bartenders, or security may ask for identification, which can include a driver�s license, passport, state-issued ID card, or another form of government ID. We require 2 forms of ID in cases where the main ID is from a foreign country or if the main form of ID is in question.
Where can I purchase tickets to shows at The Garden Club at Wild Heaven West End?
You can purchase tickets to any of our shows on our website via our upcoming show calendar. or through the
Freshtix website
When is your box office open?
Our box Office opens once doors have for that particular event. Otherwise patrons are encouraged to purchase tickets online in advance. To view The Garden Club at Wild Heaven West End calendar of events, please
click here
.
Is there seating at The Garden Club at Wild Heaven West End?
Yes, depending on the show. We do offer seating for most shows that may be listed as a General Admission show. These seats are then on a first come first serve basis.
If the show has a reserve seating option then those tables and or chairs are priced as an upgrade, and are not available for General Admission patrons, only those that have purchased the seating upgrade.
For larger shows, it may be very limited seating due to the larger standing room capacity.
Do you have ADA seating?
Yes, we have limited ADA seating available on a first-come, first-served basis. To guarantee ADA seating, we recommend that you email booking@thegardenclubatlanta.com, ahead of time so we can best accommodate you.
What time does the show begin?
All door and show times are listed on the events page, or calendar page, of the website, however, all times are subject to change. Generally, doors are at 7:00 PM, with the shows starting at 8:00 PM.
Where can I park?
Free parking is available in the parking lot in front of and to the right side The Garden Club at Wild Heaven West End off White Street.
What is the age requirement?
Most shows are ALL AGES to enter The Garden Club at Wild Heaven West End. However, on occasion the artist or venue will specify a 21 & Over show, in which an ID will need to be shown of proof of entry.
Do you have a curfew?
The curfew varies by event, but most curfew times are at 11:00 PM.
Do you sell food at the venue?
We have chips available for purchase inside the venue, but there is also El Tesoro located at the far left side of the venue in the Wild Heaven taproom. There are several great local restaurants within walking distance of The Garden Club at Wild Heaven West End in the food hall next to our building and Box Car, ASW, or Monday Night Garage.
Do you have a coat check?
Yes, in the fall and winter months we have a coat check service available at some shows.
Where is the venue located?
The venue is located in the Lee+White Development in the historic West End. Our address is 1010 White Street, Atlanta, GA 30310. Our phone number is (404)-254-2232.
What type of payment does The Garden Club at Wild Heaven West End accept?
The box office and bars accept VISA, Master Card, American Express and Discover. The merchandise counter varies from show to show.
Is The Garden Club at Wild Heaven West End hiring?
The Garden Club at Wild Heaven West End is often looking to hire. To view a full list of current openings, please
click here
.
Interested in Playing the Garden Club?
Apply to Play
